title: hedychium collinum
intro: Hedychium collinum, also known as Galgala or Galgul, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the ginger family (Zingiberaceae). It is native to the Himalayan region and has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hedychium collinum include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to alleviate digestive problems and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, Hedychium collinum is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or powder, and is also used in traditional Indian medicine to treat various ailments.
